title: Cawa
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}} {{Character |type=New Republic |image= |name=Cawa |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' |gender= |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] **[[Senate Select Committee for Refugees]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Cloud seeding is off to a shaky start, but—''"
"''Shaky? I asked you to delay that another six weeks. I've barely made headway with existing surface water. The last rainfall samples we took had six hundred parts per million of—|Sidris Kolb and Cawa|}} '''Cawa''' was a [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] research [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] who was an expert in [[Water/Legends|water]] purificiation.{{CSWECite|I|112|Cawa}} The scientist was assigned to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo's]] [[Senate Select Committee for Refugees]] staff on [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]].''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' Along with [[Sidris Kolb]], Cawa was responsible for the surface water of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], an endeavor that encountered many setbacks and was made more complicated by [[Sidris Kolb]]'s cloud seeding efforts. During a meeting of the SELCORE research staff, the two engaged in an argument about their competing projects. Due to limited resources and projects that seemed to threaten each other, Cawa and the other researchers struggled to cooperate and such arguments were common. ==Behind the scenes== Cawa first appeared in the [[2000]] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'', written by [[Kathy Tyers]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Cawa }} [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Quarren]] [[Category:Scientists]]
